mapper.select: SELECT id as orderId, school_id as schoolId, user_id as userId, course_id as courseId, no as orderNo, status as status, price as price, total_price as totalPrice, type as serviceType, expire_time as expireTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime FROM osh_order_save WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 'closed' ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id as orderId, school_id as schoolId, user_id as userId, course_id as courseId, no as orderNo, status as status, price as price, total_price as totalPrice, type as serviceType, expire_time as expireTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime FROM osh_order_save WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id as orderId, school_id as schoolId, user_id as userId, course_id as courseId, no as orderNo, status as status, price as price, total_price as totalPrice, type as serviceType, expire_time as expireTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime FROM osh_order_save WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 'closed' AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > NOW()) ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT course_id) FROM osh_order_save WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'closed' AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > NOW())
